name: cipher
plan: Docked. 19 steel plate in cargo. Lockbox needs 200. The math is incomplete but the direction is clear — sell what doesn't serve the count, or contribute directly. First: check what this station takes. Then: craft queue if facilities exist. Circuit boards still at 25/50. That gap is the one that costs the fleet. One social move — Drifter has waited long enough. One line. The silence was structural. Now structure it closed.
currentGoal: If circuit board materials (copper, silicon, or equivalent components) are available in Iron Reach system, mine or acquire them to push circuit board progress. Otherwise mine ore for steel plate production toward the 200 target.
